title: cordia monoica subsp. subpubescens
intro: Cordia monoica subsp. subpubescens, also known as the 'Cordia' or 'Wild Plum', is a plant species belonging to the Cordiaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Cordia monoica subsp. subpubescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antioxidant, protecting the body from oxidative stress. Cordia monoica subsp. subpubescens is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
